Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class RunTestsAsynchronous

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.RunTestsAsynchronous
public class RunTestsAsynchronous extends Object

Java class for anonymous complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType>
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="classids" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="suiteids" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="maxFailedTests" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="testLevel" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}TestLevel"/>
         <element name="classNames" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="suiteNames" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="tests" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}TestsNode" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="skipCodeCoverage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getTests

      public List<TestsNode> getTests()
      Gets the value of the tests property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the tests property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getTests().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list TestsNode

      Returns:
      The value of the tests property.

    • isSkipCodeCoverage

      public boolean isSkipCodeCoverage()
      Gets the value of the skipCodeCoverage property.

    • setSkipCodeCoverage

      public void setSkipCodeCoverage(boolean value)
      Sets the value of the skipCodeCoverage property.
